reasoning.research_depth: Reasonable macroeconomic analysis with data references. Covers topics competently but without deep academic rigor.
reasoning.signal_noise: Moderate content density. Some segments feel padded and there's occasional repetition of points.
reasoning.originality: Standard macroeconomics YouTube format. Topics are relevant but presentation doesn't stand out from similar channels.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Limited lasting value as content is heavily tied to current economic events and market conditions that will date quickly.
